description: dcc-bus OTLP metrics with latency SLOs: driver 10 ms, WebSocket handler 50 ms, throttle E2E p50 100 ms / p95 200 ms / p99 300 ms. Import into Grafana Cloud and pick a Prometheus/Mimir datasource fed by Alloy.

panels.description: Total command-station driver calls per second across all operations.
panels.title: Operations / s

panels.description: Share of driver calls that returned an error.
panels.title: Error rate

panels.description: Driver round-trip SLO: 10 ms. Value turns red at or above the target.
panels.title: Latency p50

panels.description: Driver round-trip SLO: 10 ms. Value turns red at or above the target.
panels.title: Latency p95

panels.description: Driver round-trip SLO: 10 ms. Value turns red at or above the target.
panels.title: Latency p99

panels.description: Round-trip latency percentiles for command-station driver operations. SLO: 10 ms (red threshold line).
panels.title: Latency percentiles by operation

panels.description: Distribution of driver round-trip times (all operations combined).
panels.title: Latency heatmap
Operations / s by layout & command station

panels.description: Per-operation breakdown for the selected layout and command station.

targets.expr: sum(rate(bigfred_dcc_bus_station_operation_duration_seconds_count{service_name="dcc-bus", layout_id=~"$layout_id", command_station_id=~"$command_station_id", station_kind=~"$station_kind", operation=~"$operation"}[$__rate_interval])) by (operation, station_kind, layout_id, command_station_id)

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(bigfred_dcc_bus_station_operation_duration_seconds_bucket{service_name="dcc-bus", layout_id=~"$layout_id", command_station_id=~"$command_station_id", station_kind=~"$station_kind", operation=~"$operation"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, operation, station_kind, layout_id, command_station_id))

100 * sum(rate(bigfred_dcc_bus_station_operation_duration_seconds_count{service_name="dcc-bus", success="false", layout_id=~"$layout_id", command_station_id=~"$command_station_id", station_kind=~"$station_kind", operation=~"$operation"}[$__rate_interval])) by (operation, station_kind, layout_id, command_station_id) / clamp_min(sum(rate(bigfred_dcc_bus_station_operation_duration_seconds_count{service_name="dcc-bus", layout_id=~"$layout_id", command_station_id=~"$command_station_id", station_kind=~"$station_kind", operation=~"$operation"}[$__rate_interval])) by (operation, station_kind, layout_id, command_station_id), 1e-9)

panels.title: Driver operation summary

panels.description: Inbound WebSocket frames handled per second (ping, loco.setSpeed, loco.subscribe, …).

panels.description: End-to-end WS handler latency (roster checks, driver, Redis, broadcast). SLO: 50 ms (red threshold line).

panels.description: Per WS command breakdown for the selected layout and command station.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(bigfred_dcc_bus_ws_command_duration_seconds_bucket{service_name="dcc-bus", layout_id=~"$layout_id", command_station_id=~"$command_station_id", command=~"$ws_command"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, command, layout_id, command_station_id))

100 * sum(rate(bigfred_dcc_bus_ws_command_duration_seconds_count{service_name="dcc-bus", success="false", layout_id=~"$layout_id", command_station_id=~"$command_station_id", command=~"$ws_command"}[$__rate_interval])) by (command, layout_id, command_station_id) / clamp_min(sum(rate(bigfred_dcc_bus_ws_command_duration_seconds_count{service_name="dcc-bus", layout_id=~"$layout_id", command_station_id=~"$command_station_id", command=~"$ws_command"}[$__rate_interval])) by (command, layout_id, command_station_id), 1e-9)
